notes: Object-add on iPad (2026-06). The 📦 オブジェクト追加 dropdown (Cube / Event / Figure) is now available on iPad — it was hidden on all touch devices. On iPad portrait (≤834px) the camera action row now wraps to two rows so the extra button fits cleanly to the right of the シーンレイヤー panel; landscape (and 12.9" portrait) keep one row. Phones are unchanged (the row is too tight there). Verified zero overlap/overflow with the dropdown shown and open, iPad portrait + landscape. Builds on v0.0.5/0.0.6 mobile & iPad UI fixes.
